===================
===================
===================
=== 68-01-20 NYC.txt
===================
===================
===================
NYC 20 Jan 1968, Carnegie Hall
Woody Guthrie Memorial Concert

This Train (with Odetta and the rest of concert participants)

Paul Cable in 'His Unreleased Recordings' explains:

"This Train is good and rousing and also quite amusing 
where Odetta is trying to persuade Dylan to do his verse. 
The whole song gets delayed while he makes up his mind 
and into her words'Come on, Bob'Odetta manages to squeeze beautifully
the inflection of someone good-humoured trying to persuade 
a recalcitrant seven year-old to do his scales".

'His Unreleased Recordings'(Scorpion/Dark Star 1978)
was the first book to document Dylan unofficial material
and the starter of my tape collection.

While we talk of Dylan books, why not visit the 'Dylan Paper Site':
http://michel.pomarede.pagesperso-orange.fr/CW&C/
books, magazines, fanzines, etc... in 27 languages (so far)

lineage: 
open reel>CD-R extraction with Easy CD-DA extractor>flacBf1tbpXSX>p+42Gj?^^j*i=%
IT'
